What We Fix

Mobile RV Repair, Done Right The First Time

Every job starts with an honest diagnosis and a fair, upfront quote. Travel trailers, fifth wheels, Class A, B, and C motorhomes — we service them all.

A/C & Heating

Roof AC diagnosis, repair, and replacement. Furnace service and Truma Combi heating units — stay comfortable in any Tennessee season.

Service Details →

Water Heaters

Repair and replacement for gas, electric, and Truma AquaGo tankless systems — hot water restored the same visit whenever possible.

Service Details →

Refrigerators

Absorption refrigerator diagnosis and repair. When your food's at risk on a trip, we diagnose fast and tell you exactly what's wrong.

Service Details →

Water Systems

Winterization, de-winterization with sanitation, fresh water pump and line repairs — protect your plumbing through every Tennessee season.

Service Details →

Pre-Purchase Inspections

Thinking about buying a used travel trailer, fifth wheel, or motorhome? A certified inspector's eye could save you thousands. Know before you buy.

Service Details →

New Owner Orientations

Just got a new rig? We walk you through every system so you hit the road confident. Seasonal check-ups keep small issues from becoming big bills.

Service Details →

The Tech Behind The Truck

Repair Is What We Do. Integrity Is Who We Are.

On The Road Again Mobile RV Service is owned and operated by Dennis Haas — an RVTI Certified Level 4 Master Technician trained through the Recreational Vehicle Service Academy in Palmetto, FL. That's one of the highest credentials a mobile RV tech can hold.

We started this business because RV owners deserve better than a six-week dealership wait list and a vague invoice. We come to you, give you a straight diagnosis, and tell you exactly what it costs before we touch a thing.

Stephen, our RVTI Certified Level 3 Technician, brings additional expertise for complex jobs — two certified techs means faster turnarounds and more eyes on harder problems.

RVTI Level 4 Master TechDennis Haas — highest field cert
RVTI Level 3 TechStephen — complex job support
Truma Certified PartnerAquaGo & Combi specialist

Truma Certified Partner

Truma Heating & Hot Water — Done Right

On The Road Again is one of very few mobile techs in Tennessee certified to sell, install, and service the Truma AquaGo tankless water heater and Truma Combi heating system. If you have Truma gear, you want a certified tech on it.

  • Truma AquaGo tankless water heater — install, service, repair
  • Truma Combi heating system — diagnosis and replacement
  • Warranty-compliant service — correct parts, correct procedure

Straight Answers

Questions RVers Ask Us

Do you really come to my campsite or driveway?

Yes — that's the whole point. On The Road Again is a fully mobile service. We come to your campsite, storage lot, or driveway anywhere across Nashville and Middle Tennessee. You never haul your rig to a shop. Call or text (615) 606-3882 with your location.

What types of RVs do you work on?

We service travel trailers, fifth wheels, Class A, Class B, and Class C motorhomes throughout Middle Tennessee. From a small pop-up to a full-size diesel pusher — if it rolls, we can diagnose it.

How do I know you're qualified to work on my rig?

Dennis Haas is an RVTI Certified Level 4 Master Technician — one of the highest credentials in the trade — trained through the Recreational Vehicle Service Academy in Palmetto, FL. He's also a certified Truma Partner. Call (615) 606-3882 and ask us anything.

Do you give prices up front before starting work?

Every time. We diagnose first, then tell you exactly what the repair will cost before a wrench turns. No surprises, no hidden fees. That's a promise.

Can you inspect a used RV before I buy it?

Yes — pre-purchase inspections are one of our most valuable services. We evaluate major systems (A/C, heat, plumbing, electrical, refrigerator, structural) and give you an honest condition report. Call (615) 606-3882 to schedule before you sign anything.
